completed_steps.summary: 11 existing docs catalogued; 6 BMad docs to overwrite; 8 legacy-*.md moved to docs/legacy/
Tech stack: React 18.3 + TS 5.9 strict + Vite 6 + Tailwind v4 + Supabase 2.90. No TanStack Query present.

architecture.md written: executive summary, BaaS pattern diagram, data/app/component/test architecture, security boundaries, known drift
Supporting docs decision: deployment and contribution content folded into development-guide.md; project-overview into architecture.md. No standalone docs needed for single-part monolith.

Validation complete: 7 files regenerated, ~93KB total. No _(To be generated)_ markers found. Legacy + archive dirs preserved.
